data.title: Update project docs to reflect relates_to drift detection and brainstorm suggestion
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new relates_to drift detection capability in sprint-drift-check.sh and the brainstorm Part C relates_to suggestion feature.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of these new capabilities — sprint drift detection now follows relates_to links, and brainstorm Part C suggests relates_to links. Without doc updates, agents will not know these features exist.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to mention relates_to drift detection, update replan-observability contract if needed to document the new drift type, update any existing sprint or brainstorm documentation that references drift detection or Part C
- OUT: Creating new documentation files, tutorials, or user guides

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, existing project documentation accurately describes that sprint drift detection follows relates_to links and that brainstorm Part C suggests relates_to links during gap analysis
  ← Satisfies: documentation alignment for SC1-SC4
